summary: Unedited live/pool broadcast footage of the presidential motorcade and Air Force One on a Beijing airport tarmac at night. Static long-lens camera shots show the armored Cadillac limo with U.S. and Chinese flags driving past, then Air Force One parked with a security detail; one frame is just motion-blur of the car crossing frame, characteristic of a continuous live shot rather than a stylized cut. Despite a high music_score, there are no title cards, graphics, fast cuts, or genre styling and the tweet only relays logistics, so this is raw event coverage, not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
